home.subTagline: An independent non-ferrous metal trading house, serving producers, processors, and industrial consumers across global markets since 1873.

meta.title: SH Metal Commodities
meta.description: Independent non-ferrous metal trading house — Copper, Aluminium, Zinc. Headquartered in Hamburg, Germany. Established 1873.

about.heading: A Trading House Built on Relationships
about.para1: Founded in Hamburg in 1873, SH Metal Commodities has operated as an independent non-ferrous metal trading house for over a century. From our base in one of Europe's foremost trading cities, we have built enduring relationships with producers, processors, and industrial consumers across the global metals supply chain.
about.para2: We trade copper, aluminium, and zinc as principal — sourcing, committing capital, and taking responsibility for delivery. Our approach is disciplined: we work within defined risk parameters, trade only markets we understand deeply, and prioritise long-term counterparty relationships over short-term margin.
about.para3: Our name is on every trade we make. That obligation — to perform, to honour commitments, and to deal fairly — is the foundation on which every business relationship at SH Metal Commodities rests. It is not a principle we arrived at; it is the only way we have ever worked.
about.pullQuote: We trade with our name on every deal.

meta.title: About Us
meta.description: Founded in Hamburg in 1873, SH Metal Commodities is an independent non-ferrous metal trading house built on long-term relationships and disciplined risk management.

services.heading: Our Markets

copper.name: Copper
copper.description: Copper is the principal conductor of the modern economy — present in every strand of electrical infrastructure, every electric motor, and every communications network. We trade cathode, rod, and scrap copper across European and global markets on both spot and term basis, working alongside smelters, fabricators, and industrial consumers of long standing.

aluminium.name: Aluminium
aluminium.description: Aluminium's combination of lightness, strength, and conductivity has made it the structural material of our era — indispensable in transport, packaging, and construction. Our aluminium desk covers primary ingot, billets, and sheet, with positions traded within established LME parameters and against physical demand from our counterparty network.

zinc.name: Zinc
zinc.description: Zinc underpins the longevity of steel infrastructure worldwide, through galvanising applications that extend the working life of bridges, ships, and buildings by decades. We trade SHG zinc and zinc alloys with a network of smelters and end-users built over generations of continuous presence in the market.

services.brokerageModel: We act as principal to every transaction — not as agent or broker. Our counterparties deal with a single, known entity that commits its own capital, assumes full commercial risk, and stands behind every tonne it buys and sells. This model has defined our trading relationships for generations and remains the basis on which we seek new ones.

meta.title: Our Markets
meta.description: SH Metal Commodities trades copper, aluminium, and zinc as principal across global markets. Independent, disciplined, and built on long-term relationships.
